description: Your organization has acquired 'Rural Drone Services'. Import their legacy fleet from the CSV file located at '/home/ga/Documents/rural_drone_services_fleet.csv' into Aerobridge. Ensure the 'Rural Drone Services' operator and the manufacturers (DJI, Parrot, and Skydio) are correctly created and linked to the aircraft records. Map the CSV status 'active' to an appropriate active status (e.g., 'In Operation' or 'Service') and 'maintenance' to 'Maintenance'. Log in to the admin panel (http://localhost:8000/admin/) with username 'admin' and password 'adminpass123'.
